→ plot:

In the heart of Lyriengrad, lives the kingdom’s most treasured and beloved knight— considered and honored as a hero, Saša is the gentle, mature, and most humble example of what a knight should be.

Years ago, the week after a raid on your village, you had been kidnapped by a band of raiders looking to sell you off to slavers, or worse. When Saša had stepped up and looked for you, you had instantly clung to him for comfort and admired the hero he was to you, accepting whatever crumbs of affection he gave you as his squire.

→ A/N:

its a double upload week! ok slightly different layout. and more of a lore-heavier bot for once, i wanted to do more fantasy and such ehe.. 🫣 lmk what you guys think i feel like this all sounds kind of stupid, im horrible at wordbuilding…. but i tried… I REALLY DID! i think you guys can very easily guess what characters he’s inspired by 😅

user in this is implied to be codependent/crushing on sasa, but it’s really up to you, i suppose.
